title: Subterine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Subterine-SWREP24.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A subterine]]
A '''Subterine''' was a vehicle which used massive drill beams to dig paths underground. In addition to being able to move underground, it could fly like an ordinary [[Starship/Legends|spaceship]].

One subterine was made from the spaceship of [[Yag Shushin]] and used by the [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomiri Witches]].

{{Veh-stub}}
